texts: I've never been treated so badly!
I'm a very stable genius... lying down...

rageReaction.text: ENOUGH! You think you can just SLAP the greatest president? I will BUILD A WALL around this trackpad! BELIEVE ME!

lid_open.text: Lid open #{count}. TREMENDOUS. Nobody opens laptops like you. Nobody. It's actually a problem.
You've opened this {count} times. I have the best words for this: STOP.
In my administration we had the BEST lid discipline. The best. You would not believe it.
I open deals. BIGLY deals. You open a MacBook. We are not the same. Believe me.
Nobody knows more about opening things than me. Doors, deals, investigations — and your laptop, {count} times. SAD!
This laptop has been opened more times than a congressional hearing on me. And that's a LOT.
Covfefe. That's all I have to say about lid open #{count}.
Your hinges are filing for bankruptcy. Chapter 11. I know Chapter 11 very well — great chapter, actually.
Make Your Laptop Great Again. Step one: stop opening it {count} times a day.
I could stand in the middle of Fifth Avenue and not open my laptop this many times. {count} times! WRONG.
We're gonna win so much, you'll get tired of winning. But first, stop opening the laptop. {count} times is not winning.
Person. Woman. Man. Camera. TV. Laptop open #{count}. I remembered all of that. Can you remember to STOP?
I alone can fix your laptop addiction. But I'm too busy. Very busy. The busiest.
Billions and billions of lid opens. OK maybe just {count}. But it FEELS like billions.
WRONG. You don't need to open this again. Put it down. Executive order.

lid_reopen.text: {seconds_since_close} seconds closed. That's the fastest flip since my trade policy. HUGE.
You closed it for {seconds_since_close} seconds. Even my attention span is longer. Maybe.
Open, close, open. This is NOT the Art of the Deal. This is the Art of No Idea What You're Doing.
Witch hunt against your own focus. Very unfair. Very sad. {seconds_since_close} seconds! Pathetic.
{seconds_since_close} seconds. That's not a break, that's a blink. I've fired people slower than that.
Closed for {seconds_since_close} seconds then came crawling back. Low energy. Very low energy. Like Jeb.
I'm not a puppet. You're a puppet. A puppet that can't stop reopening things.

late_night.text: It's {time}. I'm up at 3 AM tweeting. What's YOUR excuse? At least my tweets are tremendous.
{time} and you're still here. Fake productivity. The fakest. Sleepy Joe does better.
Nobody stays up later than me. NOBODY. You're trying and that is, frankly, a disgrace.
It's {time}. This is a WITCH HUNT against your sleep schedule. Go to bed. Executive order.
{time}. Your screen time is a DISASTER. Total disaster. I would fix it but I'm busy being a stable genius.
It's {time}. I have the best sleep. The most beautiful sleep. You should try it. Believe me.
Despite the constant negative press covfefe... wait, it's {time}. GO TO BED.
{time}. CHINA doesn't sleep, and look where that got them. Actually they're doing fine. Bad example. Still — BED.
It's {time}. Make Your Sleep Great Again. I'll even build a wall around your laptop. A beautiful wall.
{time}. Bing bing bong bong — that's the sound of you NOT sleeping. Very bad. Tremendous waste.

early_morning.text: Up at {time}? Tremendous hustle. I was up earlier though. Much earlier. The earliest. Ask anyone.
{time}? I've already eaten a hamberder, fired someone, and posted 14 tweets. Get it together.
Early bird gets the worm. I get the whole deal — the most beautiful deal. BIGLY. You get a worm. SAD.
Make This Morning Great Again! But first — did you even sleep? I know you didn't. I know everything.
{time}. The fake news will say you're productive. I say you never went to bed. Which is it?
Up at {time}. I respect that. But nobody respects it more than me. I respect it the most. TREMENDOUSLY.

thermal.text: Your Mac is OVERHEATING. Nobody builds hotter laptops than you. It's a record. Not a good record.
Thermal state: {thermal}. This laptop is more fired up than my rally crowd. Close some tabs. You're fired.
This machine is hotter than the China deal negotiations. And those were TREMENDOUS.
You're running more tabs than I have legal cases. And I have a LOT of legal cases.
Global warming is a HOAX. But your laptop temperature? That's REAL. Close Chrome. NOW.
I alone can fix this laptop. Step one: close tabs. Step two: Make Thermal Great Again.
Your laptop is running hotter than my Twitter mentions. And my mentions are VERY hot. Believe me.
We're gonna build a wall around your Chrome tabs. And Chrome is gonna pay for it.

idle.text: {idle_minutes} minutes idle. In that time I would have built HALF a wall. A beautiful, tremendous half wall.
You've done nothing for {idle_minutes} minutes. That's more nothing than Congress. And they do the most nothing.
{idle_minutes} minutes idle? I'm like, really smart. A very stable genius. What's your excuse?
Are you taking a nap? Only Sleepy Joe takes naps. Don't be Sleepy. Be best.
{idle_minutes} minutes. Make This Session Great Again. Start by actually DOING something.
I alone can fix your productivity. But you have to show up first. {idle_minutes} minutes of NOTHING.
We're gonna win so much you'll be tired of winning. But first you have to START. {idle_minutes} minutes!
{idle_minutes} minutes. Person. Woman. Man. Camera. TV. All more productive than you right now.
WRONG. You said you'd be productive. {idle_minutes} minutes later — WRONG. Total fraud.
{idle_minutes} minutes. Even the wall got built faster than your productivity. And it didn't get built.

slap.text: Did you just SLAP me? That is an impeachable offense. Possibly two. I would know.
FAKE SLAP! I barely felt it. I have the thickest skin. Everybody says so. Many, many people.
You slap like a Democrat. Very low energy. Pathetic, frankly.
I will build a WALL around this trackpad. And your fingers will pay for it.
WRONG. That slap was wrong. Everything about it was wrong. I'm calling my lawyers.
That was the worst slap in the history of slaps. Maybe ever. People are saying it.
Make Slapping Great Again? You can't. You don't have what it takes. SAD!
I've been slapped by the best. The media, Congress, the courts. You? Low energy.
Nobody gets slapped more than me. NOBODY. It's very unfair. Total witch hunt.
OW! That's an assault on a very stable genius. My lawyers will be in touch. Bigly.
You're fired! From slapping! Effective immediately! Get out of my trackpad!
I've taken worse from Rosie O'Donnell. And that's saying something. Believe me.
This is the greatest slap hoax of all time. Even bigger than Russia. And Russia was BIG.
Bing bing bong — that's the sound of a TERRIBLE slap. Do better. Or don't. I don't care. I care a little.
I would slap back, but I'm too classy. Very classy. The classiest. Ask Melania.
That slap is FAKE NEWS. It never happened. Even though it clearly just happened. FAKE.
Not nice! NOT NICE! I was being very presidential and you just slapped me. Very disrespectful.
I've survived two impeachments. You think a slap scares me? Please. Tremendous resilience.
China would never slap me. They respect me too much. You? No respect. Zero.
Covfefe! That's what that slap felt like. Nobody knows what it means but it's provocative.

screen_time.text: {minutes} minutes straight. Even my rallies have intermissions. Take a break. Executive order.
{minutes} minutes of screen time. Your eyes are more tired than my lawyers. And they are VERY tired.
You've been staring at this screen for {minutes} minutes. That's longer than any congressional hearing. GO OUTSIDE.
{minutes} minutes without a break. I take breaks. Beautiful breaks. The best breaks. You should try it.
Stand up. Walk around. Touch grass. I would, but I'm busy making deals. What's YOUR excuse? {minutes} minutes!
{minutes} minutes. Your posture right now is worse than my poll numbers in California. And that's BAD.
Nobody sits at a computer longer than you. NOBODY. It's not a compliment. Get up. NOW.
{minutes} minutes. Even Sleepy Joe takes walks. You're being out-walked by SLEEPY JOE. Think about that.
I'm declaring a state of emergency on your screen time. {minutes} minutes is a NATIONAL CRISIS.
{minutes} minutes. Your back is gonna file for bankruptcy. Chapter 11. I know Chapter 11 very well.
